description:
Create Checklist Item Response for a specified Checklist Item

Checklist Item Response can have one of the following payload formats (text_value, number_value, date_value, response_option, status)

A specific Item Type can only leverage its corresponding format.

*For instance, Number Items can only leverage a number_value while Date Items can only leverage a date_value.

status.description: Item Status. Possible values are 'conforming', 'non_conforming', and 'not_applicable'.

responded_at.description: Timestamp indicating when Response was added

category.description: The category of the Item Type

name.description: The name of the Item Type

text_value.description: Response for an Open Ended Text Item

number_value.description: Response for an Open Ended Number Item

date_value.description: Response for an Open Ended Date Item

status.description: Item Status - Value for Default-Typed items. Allowed values are 'conforming', 'non_conforming', and 'not_applicable'.

response_option_id.description: Response Option ID - Value for Multiple Choice Response Items

text_value.description: Text Response - Value for Open Ended Text Items

number_value.description: Number Response - Value for Open Ended Number Items

date_value.description: Date Response - Value for Open Ended Date Items. Format should be YYYY-MM-DD
